message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** Gucci Ace Perforated Interlocking G Women's Shoes
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Elegant White Leather with Gray Accents, Style 598527 AYO70 9094

**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):**
Experience the epitome of luxury with Gucci's Ace Perforated Interlocking G women's shoes. Crafted from high-quality white leather, these shoes feature an iconic interlocking double G motif through a floral pattern, complemented by gray leather details on the back. Perfect for those who seek elegance and sophistication.

**Description (Descrizione):**

- **Design and Materials:**
  • **Upper Material:** High-quality white leather for a luxurious feel and appearance.
  • **Design Elements:** The shoes feature an interlocking double G motif through a floral pattern, adding a touch of sophistication and elegance.
  • **Color Accents:** Gray leather details on the back provide a subtle contrast to the white leather.

- **Style and Comfort:**
  • **Style Number:** 598527 AYO70 9094
  • **Size:** Available in size 38 for a comfortable fit.
  • **Perforation:** The shoes include perforations for added breathability and style.

- **Brand Authenticity:**
  • **Gucci Branding:** The shoes are authentic Gucci products, ensuring the highest quality and craftsmanship.
  • **Quality Assurance:** Each pair is meticulously designed and manufactured to meet Gucci's high standards.

- **Additional Information:**
  • **Pricing:** Prices may vary depending on the retailer, ranging from $280.00 to $662.00, and €312.00 to €823.00.
  • **Availability:** Available in stock at various retailers such as StockX, GOAT, and KicksCrew.
